item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 6F, C, Model Number: I550BF6C; 2) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 9F, C, Model Number: I5 Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 6F, C, Model Number: I550BF6C; 2) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 9F, C, Model Number: I5
item.summary: The kits containing Huons Lidocaine HCL Injection USP 1% 10mg/ml 5mL Ampules (Lidocaine Ampules)(OEM). A recall notice was issued by Huons Co., Ltd. for Lidocaine Ampules due to quality issues identified during a recent FDA manufacturing inspection of its drug manufacturing site. Product details: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 6F, C, Model Number: I550BF6C; 2) STD, INTRO-FLEX INTRODUCER 9F, C, Model Number: I505BF9C
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
